name: method
value: SOAR exposes metadata and abstract but no public full-text bundle. The packet stores abstract-level thresholds: <0.5D patch negligible, 1.0D patch comparable to infinite plate, circular/annular superposition, and 6% curve-fit claim. Raw curve rows still need full-text digitization or a data table.
note: Do not use this packet to tune absolute ground-effect multipliers without the existing ZJU/near-surface rows.
